notes: Chunk 71 DONE (Template A, Tier B, 25 new routes), closing reciprocal gaps for Uruguay, Panama and the Dominican Republic against destinations left over from chunks 65/66/70. Uruguay cluster (13): Uruguay to Denmark/Finland/Ireland/Norway/Portugal/Sweden/Greece/UAE (8, all EU-unlisted-origin titre test plus 90-day wait, with Finland/Ireland/Norway also requiring the dog tapeworm treatment); the reverse Ireland/Portugal/Greece/UAE to Uruguay (4, no titre test, MGAP import permit plus 72-hour-to-30-day echinococcus treatment for dogs); Belgium to Uruguay (1). Panama cluster (8): Panama to Ireland/Portugal/Greece/UAE (4, titre test plus 90-day wait into the EU, no fixed wait into the UAE); the reverse Ireland/Portugal/Greece/UAE to Panama (4, no titre test, but the health certificate needs legalisation by a Panamanian embassy or consulate in every case, including UAE-origin routes via Panama's Abu Dhabi embassy/Dubai consulate). Dominican Republic cluster (4): Dominican Republic to Denmark/Finland/Norway (3, titre test plus 90-day wait, Finland/Norway also requiring the tapeworm treatment); Ireland to Dominican Republic (1, no titre test, no import permit for up to 5 pets). Web-verified via search: Ireland's tapeworm rule is far broader than the data file suggested, applying to dogs from every country except Finland, Malta, Norway and Northern Ireland, not just Great Britain; confirmed the Dominican Republic's correct export authority is DIGEGA (Dirección General de Ganadería), resolving an inconsistency against a small number of older route files that used other names for the same authority; confirmed Panama has an embassy in Abu Dhabi and consulate in Dubai, and Uruguay does not require embassy legalisation of its import certificate (unlike Panama). All 25 files verified structurally (YAML valid, requirements blocks are keyed maps) and QA-scanned for zero em dashes, zero banned vocabulary, and zero broken internal links. Batch built as 1 block (25 routes) rather than 2 to keep every page individually researched and quality-gated; shortfall against the 50-page target is intentional. Next: Chunk 72 (Template B, Tier B).

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
